case_title: JACQUELYNE GREEN-SAVAGE VS. UPS AIR FREIGHT SERVICES,INC.,A TEXAS CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN-SAVAGE, JACQUELYNE AS TO DEFENDANT UPS AIR FREIGHT SERVICES,INC.,A TEXAS CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN-SAVAGE, JACQUELYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UPS AIR FREIGHT SERVICES,INC.,A TEXAS CORP. $9,325.94 PRINCIPAL, $7.31 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,486.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
